scoreComponents.label: Package average
scoreComponents.evidence: Average of the visible package readiness rows.

scoreComponents.label: Interactive surfaces
scoreComponents.evidence: Every visible package lane has a template surface.

scoreComponents.label: Cache truth
scoreComponents.evidence: Physical cache manifests match the current package-status manifest set.

scoreComponents.label: Native scroll source proof
scoreComponents.evidence: Primary template routes use document-flow scrolling without custom scrollbar runtime or scroll traps.

scoreComponents.label: No misleading lanes
scoreComponents.evidence: No package row is classified as dummy or misleading.

scoreComponents.label: Maturity classification
scoreComponents.evidence: Every visible lane uses an allowed maturity classification.

scoreComponents.label: Provider readiness coverage
scoreComponents.evidence: Every provider-gated package has a visible readiness card without live execution or secret values.

scoreComponents.label: Route helper execution
scoreComponents.evidence: Focused checks execute readiness helpers without network calls, live provider execution, or secret values.

requiredProofs.label: Browser route proof
requiredProofs.requiredEvidence: Attach a running preview and verify nonblank rendering, native wheel scrolling, responsive shell behavior, and no custom scrollbar runtime.

requiredProofs.label: Live provider proof
requiredProofs.requiredEvidence: Configure real app-owned credentials and capture live-provider proof without exposing secret values.

scoreGate.honesty: App readiness stays capped at 89 until browser route proof or live-provider evidence is attached.

launchEvidenceSummaryRows.label: Package health
launchEvidenceSummaryRows.description: Installed package set and current cache manifests agree.

launchEvidenceSummaryRows.label: Browser check
launchEvidenceSummaryRows.description: Browser evidence is not attached, so app readiness stays capped at 89.

launchEvidenceSummaryRows.label: Live integrations
launchEvidenceSummaryRows.description: Credentialed Authentication, data, payments, AI, and automation runs remain app-owned provider work.

styleEvidenceRows.title: dx-style browser compatibility
styleEvidenceRows.nextAction: Run dx style check, then dx check --json, and reload the check-panel receipt.

sourceGuardRunbookFixtures.commandPurpose: Validate source-owned Forge package lock, archive receipt, rollback receipt, cache-file, and safety_archive status coverage for the app template.

styleEvidenceRows.title: dx-style browser compatibility
styleEvidenceRows.nextAction: Run dx style check, then dx check --json, and reload the check-panel receipt.
